title: smilax myrtillus
intro: Smilax myrtillus, also known as the wild blueberry or bilberry, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the Smilacaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Smilax myrtillus include its ability to improve vision, boost the immune system, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve cognitive function. Smilax myrtillus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and can also be used fresh or frozen in jams, preserves, and other culinary preparations.
